biological_replicate: ΔPsAF1, ΔPsAF5, ΔPsAF7, ΔPsAF9, and ΔPsAF10 mutants
technical_replicate: fully rescued the defects observed in three independent ΔPsAF5 mutants.
experimental_design: soybean infection tests revealed that the virulence of the ΔPsAF1, ΔPsAF5, ΔPsAF7, ΔPsAF9, and ΔPsAF10 mutants were all reduced by more than 40%.
factor_value: mutant strains (ΔPsAF1, ΔPsAF5, ΔPsAF7, ΔPsAF9, ΔPsAF10)
